[APS-xxx §N]

## Gap Description

[Describe what is missing, ambiguous, or contradictory.]

## Impact

- [ ] Blocks conformance testing
- [ ] Blocks implementation
- [ ] Creates ambiguity between implementations
- [ ] Creates traceability gap

## Affected Invariants

[INV-xxx or "unknown"]

## Proposed Resolution

[Optional: suggest how the gap should be resolved. If you are proposing a normative change, open an RFC instead.]

## Priority

- [ ] Critical — blocks certification
- [ ] High — blocks conformance testing
- [ ] Medium — creates ambiguity
- [ ] Low — minor inconsistency
